mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement - Where your sense of privilege meets deluxe banking services!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this-I once threw a fit at a fancy restaurant because they didn't serve my favorite imported water. I mean, how dare they not cater to my refined taste buds, right? I demanded to speak to the manager, who eventually had to drive to another city just to fetch my precious water, all on the house, of course. Because when you're as entitled as I am, you deserve nothing but the best. And that, my friends, is how you assert your dominance in style.
